overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit dystopian urban street. The player walks along wet sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and passes by a hotel with a distinctive pink neon sign before reaching a pawn shop area. The scene features heavy rain, reflective wet pavement, and cyberpunk architecture with teal and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city sidewalk with safety railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a road, approaching an intersection in the rain

entered.detail: illuminated teal neon sign reading 'LOS OSOS' mounted on a building facade
large distinctive pink neon sign shaped like a spiky crown or explosion atop a distant hotel building
yellow and black metal safety railing running along the edge of the wet sidewalk
tall street lamp casting bright white light through the rain and mist

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, with the camera walking along a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by yellow safety railings. The teal 'LOS OSOS' neon sign glows on the left while a distinctive pink neon hotel sign looms in the distance. Street lamps illuminate the falling rain, creating reflective patterns on the pavement.

events.description: reaches the intersection and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street
enters the shadow of the concrete overpass, significantly reducing ambient light

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at a crosswalk and turning right to pass under a dark overpass

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Rio Benito' suspended over the intersection
traffic signal showing red lights mounted on a black pole
large concrete bridge structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wet asphalt street at a crosswalk marked with yellow lines, passing under a 'Rio Benito' street sign. As the camera moves forward, it enters the shadow of a massive concrete overpass, causing the scene to darken significantly. The pink neon hotel sign remains visible ahead but grows larger as the camera approaches.

events.description: emerges from under the overpass back into the open rainy street
pedestrians appear walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along a waterfront sidewalk passing concrete barriers, approaching the hotel building with the pink neon sign

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: white concrete jersey barriers lining the right side of the walkway
illuminated vertical advertisement screen on a building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass, the camera continues along a wet sidewalk lined with white concrete barriers on the right. The hotel building with the pink neon sign now dominates the left side of the frame. Other pedestrians become visible walking ahead on the sidewalk, and digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area with pawn shop

events.description: approaches street vendor camping setup on the sidewalk near the pawn shop

agents.ego_description: walking past a street vendor area and approaching a pawn shop with bright green signage

notable_agents.action: person standing near the street vendor tent on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright green illuminated sign reading 'PAWN SHOP' with additional text above
makeshift camping setup with orange tarp and scattered items on the sidewalk
set of concrete steps leading down to a lower sidewalk level

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street vendor area with a bright green 'PAWN SHOP' neon sign illuminating the right side of the frame. A makeshift tent with camping chairs sits on the wet sidewalk next to concrete stairs. The hotel building recedes into the background as the camera focuses on the detailed street-level urban decay and vendor setup.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a neon-lit sidewalk through a dark underpass toward a cluttered street vendor area. It begins by walking along a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by yellow railings, where a teal LOS OSOS sign glows against the falling rain and a pink hotel sign looms in the distance. As the camera crosses a yellow-marked intersection under a Rio Benito street sign, the environment suddenly darkens as it passes beneath the heavy shadow of a massive concrete overpass. The scene then opens back into the light, emerging from the tunnel to find the pink hotel sign dominating the left side of the frame while digital billboards illuminate pedestrians on the right. Finally, the camera shifts its focus away from the hotel toward a bright green PAWN SHOP sign, passing a makeshift tent and camping chairs set up amidst the urban decay of the wet sidewalk.
